case_title: GEORGE D. FALLEY VS. PAUL NARLOCK

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2010 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY FALLEY, GEORGE D. AS TO DEFENDANT NARLOCK, PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$69.00) SERVED MAR-23-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NARLOCK, PAUL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-28-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-28-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FALLEY, GEORGE D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NARLOCK, PAUL $5,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $144.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,544.50, THE JUDGMENT INCLUDES $2900.00 FOR PROPERTY LOSS; AND $2500.00 FOR GENERAL AND SPECAIL DAMAGES FOR BODILY INJURIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
